# AutoFormat.PurifierLinkify.txt 知识梳理

> 来源: `AutoFormat.PurifierLinkify.txt` | 字数: 308

## 内容全文

AutoFormat.PurifierLinkify

TYPE: bool

VERSION: 2.0.1

DEFAULT: false

--DESCRIPTION--

<p>

Internal auto-formatter that converts configuration directives in

syntax <a>%Namespace.Directive</a> to links. <code>a</code> tags

with the <code>href</code> attribute must be allowed.

</p>

--# vim: et sw=4 sts=4
